pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 29 INSERT statement creates patient with firstname='Eleanor'
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 29 INSERT statement creates patient with lastname='Whitfield'
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 29 INSERT statement sets DOB='1958-04-12', task.json description confirms DOB 04/12/1958
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 30 and export_result.sh line 64 both reference '45 Oak Lane' as initial address
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 30 and export_result.sh line 67 both reference 'Hartford' as initial city
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 30 sets state='CT'
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 30 and export_result.sh line 68 both reference '06103'. Web search confirms 06103 is a valid Connecticut zip code for Hartford.
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 31 and export_result.sh line 69 both reference '860-555-0147'. Web search confirms 860 is correct area code for Hartford, CT.
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 31 sets initial email='ewhitfield@email.com'
Code analysis: task.json line 23, verifier.py line 36, task.json description line 4 all reference '789 Birchwood Drive Apt 3B' as expected address
Code analysis: task.json line 24, verifier.py line 37, and task.json description line 4 all reference 'New Haven' as expected city
Code analysis: task.json line 25, verifier.py line 105, task.json description line 4 all specify state should remain 'CT'
Code analysis: task.json line 26, verifier.py line 38 reference '06511'. Web search confirms 06511 is a valid Connecticut zip code for New Haven/Hamden area.
Code analysis: task.json line 27, verifier.py line 39, task.json description line 4 all reference '203-555-0389'. Web search confirms 203 is correct area code for New Haven, CT.
Code analysis: task.json line 28, verifier.py line 40, task.json description line 4 all reference 'eleanor.whitfield@gmail.com' as expected email

privileged_info_summary: Eleanor Whitfield (DOB: 1958-04-12) is a synthetic test patient created specifically for this task (PID 9000). The patient initially has Hartford, CT demographics (address: 45 Oak Lane, zip: 06103, phone: 860-555-0147, email: ewhitfield@email.com) and is updated to New Haven, CT demographics (address: 789 Birchwood Drive Apt 3B, zip: 06511, phone: 203-555-0389, email: eleanor.whitfield@gmail.com). Both zip codes are valid Connecticut areas, and phone area codes match their respective cities (860 for Hartford, 203 for New Haven). The addresses are fictional but plausible.
